comment: Brian (ElevenLabs) VO for Episode 11 (300s): Australia vs Turkey, June 14 2026 (TV schedule). Canon: content/Stories/Australia-vs-Turkey.md (88' Turkey lead 2-1, Australia free kick, Souttar rises — cliffhanger). VERIFIED real facts: Australia pushed eventual finalists Argentina to the brink in the 2022 Round of 16; Mathew Ryan has played in 6 leagues across 4 continents, 4th World Cup; Turkey finished THIRD at the 2002 World Cup (their golden generation); Hakan Calhanoglu left Turkey at 18 and built his career in Germany and Italy. Theme: two nations of wanderers. RULES: recap of Ep10 labeled OUR PREDICTION; this ending is OUR PREDICTION (2-2, Souttar's late header). Lines short - never tempo-stretch.

lines.text: Some supporters belong to a city. This one belongs to no country at all. A wanderer with a suitcase of flags, who has stood in every stadium the game has ever known.
Tonight, he finds his people.
Last time, we predicted Haiti and Scotland would draw and dance. Tonight — two nations of wanderers, fighting for one place in the next round.
Welcome back to WorldCup twenty-six Legends, episode eleven. Australia versus Turkey. The nomads' duel.
And stay with me — because in the eighty-eighth minute, one desperate header decides everything.
First, the wanderers. Australia — the island continent, football's great survivors, who in twenty twenty-two pushed Argentina to the very brink.
And Mathew Ryan: their captain and goalkeeper, a man who has played in six leagues across four continents. This is his fourth World Cup. Home, for him, is wherever he fights.
Turkey are wanderers too. The bridge between East and West — and in two thousand two, they finished THIRD at a World Cup. A golden age the country has been chasing ever since.
Their leader, Calhanoglu, left Turkey at eighteen and built an empire in Germany and Italy. Home is not where you are born — it is where you fight.
Tonight, one of these wanderers finds a home in the knockout rounds. The other goes back on the road.
Meet the Socceroos. Built on grit, running, and absolutely no fear.
Mathew Ryan, thirty-four, reflexes still razor-sharp. Harry Souttar guards the box like a castle wall. And Jackson Irvine covers every blade of grass.
Survivors. Every single one of them.
This is Australia's last chance to define their tournament.
But Turkey carry the joy of a new golden generation, light on their feet and full of swagger.
Arda Guler drifts across the pitch like smoke — here, then gone, then appearing in the most dangerous space on the field.
Kenan Yildiz, the Juventus prodigy who chose Turkey over Germany, plays with pure joy. And Calhanoglu bends free kicks like gravity is optional.
Proving twenty-oh-two was no fluke — but a promise.
And the duel inside the match: Calhanoglu against Ryan. The conductor's free kick... against the keeper of six leagues. Set-piece against reflex.
Our prediction — built on grit, on swagger, and on one desperate header. Watch.
Turkey strike first. Yildiz dances inside and finishes. Then Guler bends one home. Two-one Turkey — and the clock is bleeding away.
But Australia have always been survivors. They throw everybody forward. And the clock crawls toward... the eighty-eighth minute.
Free kick, thirty-five yards. Every Socceroo pushes up — even Ryan, the goalkeeper, jogs to the edge of the box. The whole stadium rises.
The ball swings in. Souttar climbs above everyone —
HEADER! It arrows in! TWO—TWO! The towering defender saves Australia in the final breath!
Full time in our story: two-two. Two nations of wanderers — and tonight, neither one goes home. The road continues.
Do you agree? Comment SOCCEROOS if Australia reach the knockouts again. Comment CRESCENT if Turkey's golden age is back.
And the wanderer with the suitcase? Legend number eleven: The Wanderer. No nation, no home — just every World Cup, forever.
Tonight, he stood with both. Collect him inside the game.
Which brings us to YOU. At WorldCup twenty-six dot world, pick three of the forty-eight nations — and every goal they score... scores for you.
Free to play. Live leaderboard. Underdogs pay triple.
Hit like — send this to the friend who's always on the move. And subscribe: the legends are only beginning.
